title: Operational Form
description: Operational Form v1 contract for FRM-01 through FRM-27. Forms must carry form code, source object, auto-generated/inherited fields, confirmation, evidence, audit, and status.
$comment: Sources: Operational Forms pack and PHIEU TU SINH. TODO: official per-form payload schemas will be generated in later phases if source documents lock them.

form_code.description: Form code, e.g. FRM-01 through FRM-27.

previous_form_id.description: Previous form inherited by this form when applicable.

production_profile_id.description: Original production profile/source profile when forms inherit from it.

auto_generated_fields.description: Fields auto-generated or auto-pulled by the system; not operator-entered business logic.

manual_fields.description: Fields that operators are allowed to enter manually when source documents allow.

confirmations.description: Personal confirmation block required before transitions.

misa_checkpoint.description: Whether this form can create or represent a MISA checkpoint.
